name: io.github.sluyasu/openinsurance-wiki
description: Read-only MCP server over an open, source-cited knowledge base of insurance products (Belgium: 17 insurers, 162 products). Search, compare, detect duplicate cover.

environmentVariables.name: INSURANCE_WIKI_REPO
environmentVariables.description: Path to a local clone of github.com/sluyasu/OpenInsurance (the wiki dataset lives in the repo, not in the package)
